error_generic: Something went wrong. Check your paths in Settings and try again.
error_network_dns: Could not reach the server (network or DNS error). Check your internet connection and try again.
error_network_nexus: Could not connect to Nexus. If the website works in your browser, allow Junimo Hut through your firewall or configure your system proxy for desktop apps.
install_summary_with_fail: Installed {installed}. {failed} failed — check the footer for details.
install_complete_one_mod: One more mod for the collection.
install_complete_partial: Added {ok} to your library. {fail} need a second look.
install_complete_none: Nothing installed — {archives} could not be unpacked.
empty_library_tip_0: Profiles remember which mods are on for each save — handy when you swap playstyles.
empty_library_tip_1: Click a Tags cell to label a mod without opening its details.
empty_library_tip_2: Use Check Updates to scan Nexus-linked mods before you launch.
empty_library_tip_3: Drag an archive onto the list to queue it in the install dialog.
empty_library_title: No mods in the hut yet
empty_library_hint: Drop a .zip, .7z, or .rar here, or choose Install Mod above.
no_matching_mods_hint: Nothing matches "{query}". Try another search or change filters in Settings.
library_milestone_1: First mod in the library. The hut's open for business.
library_milestone_10: Ten mods — your load order is taking shape.
library_milestone_25: Twenty-five mods. Profiles are starting to matter.
library_milestone_50: Fifty mods under management. You know what you're doing.
library_milestone_100: A hundred mods. The junimos are busy today.
all_enabled_message: Every mod enabled — {count} ready for Pelican Town.
launch_sent_message: SMAPI's starting — see you in Pelican Town.
updates_checked_none: Checked {count}. Everything matches the latest version.
updates_checked_found: Update check finished. Review the Status column for changes.
hut_proverb_0: Every mod folder tells a story. Yours is organized.
hut_proverb_1: Load order is peace of mind.
hut_proverb_2: The best save file is the one you actually play.
hut_proverb_3: A tidy Mods folder beats a perfect load order spreadsheet.
about_dialog_disclaimer: Not affiliated with ConcernedApe or Chucklefish.
reinstall_saved_delete_old_label: Remove old mod files first (keeps config.json and manifest.json)
reinstall_saved_missing_error: No saved download found for this mod.
reinstall_saved_confirm_message: Reinstall "{modName}" from {archiveName}? Your mod folder will be replaced with the saved archive.
brand_wordmark_title: Junimo Hut — Mod manager for Stardew Valley
setup_welcome_body: Tell Junimo Hut where Stardew Valley lives and where to store mod files. Enabled mods are symlinked into your game's Mods folder.
settings_nexus_hint: Paste an API key from your Nexus Mods account to download updates in Junimo Hut.
download_no_archive_path: Download finished but no archive path was returned.
download_complete_review: Download complete. Review the install dialog.
downloads_search_placeholder: Search by mod or file name…
downloads_empty_history: No saved archives yet. Finished Nexus downloads appear here for install or reinstall.
downloads_active_empty: Nothing downloading. Nexus downloads show progress here.
downloads_load_error: Couldn't load saved archives. Check Settings paths or your connection, then try again.
downloads_unlinked_title: Not linked to a mod in your library
downloads_unlinked_hint: Install once so future archives match by manifest UniqueID or Nexus mod ID.
downloads_bulk_learn_hint: Ctrl+click to select · Shift+click for a range · Enter on a focused row installs · Esc to clear
downloads_bulk_range_hint: Shift+click another row to add to the selection
downloads_bulk_reinstall_confirm_message: Reinstall {count} from saved archives? Each mod folder will be replaced with its saved archive.
delete_download_confirm_message: "{fileName}"{forMod} will be permanently deleted from your downloads folder.
mod_update_ignored_message: Update notice hidden for this mod.
mod_update_resumed_message: Update notices resumed for this mod.
no_nexus_update_key: No Nexus update key for this mod.
nexus_key_required: Paste a Nexus Mods API key before connecting.
nexus_key_rejected: Nexus API key was rejected. Copy a valid key from your Nexus account settings.
register_nxm_success: Registered nxm:// links to open in Junimo Hut.
smapi_installer_opened: Opened the SMAPI installer. Run it to install or update SMAPI.
update_downloaded_for_message: Update downloaded for {name}. Review the install dialog.
delete_mod_confirm_message: "{name}" will be removed from your Mods folder. This cannot be undone.
delete_mods_batch_confirm_message: {count} will be removed from your Mods folder. This cannot be undone.
delete_bundle_confirm_message: "{name}" and all {count} installed parts will be removed from your Mods folder. This cannot be undone.
delete_mod_delete_archive_hint_one: Applies to 1 mod with a saved archive
delete_mod_delete_archive_hint_other: Applies to {count} mods with saved archives
delete_mod_delete_archive_none_hint: No selected mods have a saved archive
mod_display_name_aria: Custom display name for mod list
unmanaged_mods_dialog_message: These folders live in your Stardew Valley Mods directory but are not managed by Junimo Hut. They can cause duplicate installs or SMAPI launch errors if they overlap with your library.
duplicate_mods_dialog_message: These mods have multiple copies in your library with the same SMAPI UniqueID. SMAPI skips both, so neither loads. Remove the extra copies and keep the recommended folder for each mod.
install_overwrite_existing_mod_hint: This mod is already in your library. Select the existing folder below to merge the update into it.
install_overwrite_existing_mod_merge_int: This archive matches a mod already in your library.
This archive matches mods already in your library.
install_overwrite_select_required_hint: Choose a merge target to continue.
install_dependency_warning_body_one: This mod declares dependencies that are not satisfied in your library. You can still install it, but it may not work until you add them.
install_dependency_warning_body_other: Some mods in this queue declare dependencies that are not satisfied in your library. You can still install, but they may not work until you add them.
install_overwrite_warning_title: No manifest — looks like a file patch
install_overwrite_warning_body_one: This archive has no manifest.json. Its files match paths inside an installed mod and are usually meant to overwrite files there, not install as a new mod.
install_overwrite_warning_body_other: Some archives have no manifest.json. Their files match paths inside installed mods and are usually meant to overwrite files there, not install as new mods.
install_overwrite_target_hint: Choose which installed mod folder should receive these files.
install_overwrite_multi_target_hint: Select each mod folder that should receive matching files from this archive.
mod_contains_overwrites_tooltip: File patches were merged into this mod through Junimo Hut. Its files may differ from a clean install.
install_suggested_tags_hint_one: One tag was suggested from mod metadata. Change or clear before installing.
install_suggested_tags_hint_other: {count} tags were suggested from mod metadata. Change or clear before installing.
dependency_issues_footer_one: 1 mod has dependency issues — review the Status column.
dependency_issues_footer_other: {count} mods have dependency issues — review the Status column.
updates_filter_footer_one: Showing 1 mod with an update available.
grid_incompatible_filter_empty_hint: Clear the filter or run Check Updates to refresh compatibility status.
mod_dataset_load_error: Could not load mod page info from the dataset.
grid_updates_filter_empty_hint: Clear the filter or run Check Updates from the toolbar.
grid_dependency_filter_empty_hint: Clear the filter to see your full library.
grid_tags_filter_empty_hint: Turn tags back on in the sidebar, or assign tags to mods.
grid_updates_filter_meta: Showing mods with an update in the Status column
grid_dependency_filter_meta: Showing mods with missing or unsatisfied dependencies
grid_incompatible_filter_meta: Showing mods marked incompatible on the SMAPI wiki
grid_tags_filtering_meta: Hides rows only — enabled mods and SMAPI are unchanged
grid_bulk_shift_hint: Shift+click another row to add to the selection
grid_bulk_keyboard_hint: Ctrl+click to select multiple mods · Shift+click for a range · Esc to clear
install_display_name_hint: Some archives include multiple CP/AT variants that share the same manifest name. Choose how they should appear after install.
settings_show_install_summary: Show install results in the install dialog
settings_paths_hint: Enabled mods are symlinked from your mod library into the game Mods folder.
workspace_onboarding_text: Profiles switch which mods are enabled per playstyle. Click a Tags cell to assign labels. Drop archives on the list or use Install Mod.
grid_tags_learn_hint: to assign labels · Filter the list with tag toggles in the sidebar
tags_sidebar_empty_hint: Tags label mods and filter the list. Click a Tags cell in the grid to assign labels.
tags_sidebar_footer_hint: Toggle filters to narrow the mod list. Click a Tags cell to assign labels.
dropdown_typeahead_idle_hint: Type a letter to jump to an option
config_editor_no_mods_with_json: No mods with JSON files in your library.
config_editor_empty_library_hint: Install mods that include config.json or other .json files, then choose Edit configs from a mod in Junimo Hut.
config_editor_select_mod_hint: Select a mod above to browse its JSON files.
config_editor_no_json_in_mod: No JSON files in this mod folder.
config_editor_unsaved_file_switch_body: Your edits have not been saved. Discard them and open the other file?
config_editor_no_config: This mod has no config.json yet.
config_editor_mod_missing: This mod is no longer in your library.
config_editor_jsonc_hint: Comments and trailing commas are allowed.
config_editor_unsaved_close_body: Your edits have not been saved. Discard them and close the editor?
config_editor_unsaved_switch_body: Your edits have not been saved. Discard them and open the other mod's config?
config_editor_unsaved_profile_body: The config editor has unsaved changes. Discard them and switch profiles?
config_editor_discard_confirm_body: Reload the file from disk and lose your unsaved edits?
jsonc_error_invalid_number_format: This number is not formatted correctly.
jsonc_error_property_name_expected: Expected a property name in quotes.
jsonc_error_colon_expected: Expected a colon after the property name.
jsonc_error_invalid_comment_token: This comment is not valid here.
confirm_delete_category_message: Delete tag "{name}"? Mods keep their labels until you remove them.
confirm_delete_profile_message: Delete profile "{name}"? Enabled mods for this profile will be lost.
confirm_switch_profile_message: Switch to profile-specific configs? Junimo Hut will reload mod configs for the active profile.
grid_mod_list_aria: Mod list. Drop mod archives here to install.
api_client_init_error: Could not initialize the app. Restart Junimo Hut or check Settings paths.
